scripts.docker:reset: docker compose -f packages/webapi/docker/docker-compose.yml down -v && yarn docker:dev
scripts.ncu: ncu -u -x "blendsdk,@fluentui/*,react,react-dom,@types/react,@types/react-dom" && yarn workspaces foreach -A exec "ncu -u -x 'blendsdk,@fluentui/*,react,react-dom,@types/react,@types/react-dom'" && rm -fR node_modules yarn.lock && yarn install
